text.title: Agent Architectures (Memory + Tools + Planning + Reflection) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-architectures is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Agent crashes at iteration 60 with context-window error.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1: compress at 30% threshold.

antipattern.description: Agent fabricates a tool call with wrong args; downstream service 500s.
antipattern.reason: No schema validation in tool dispatch.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: validate JSON Schema before dispatch.
Fix: Apply r4 + r5: reflection + K-iteration eviction.
